data.title: BNB Drops Below 550 USDT with a 3.70% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 10, 2025, 14:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 550 USDT and is now trading at 548.51001 USDT, with a narrowed 3.70% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: MyShell: The team has no connection or association with Web3Port
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MyShell posted on the X platform: "Rumors about Web3Port are spreading. It needs to be clarified that the MyShell team has no connection or association with Web3Port, nor does it participate in any activities related to it. MyShell is committed to innovating and expanding the possibilities of AI and cryptocurrency."

data.title: Whale Increases Bitcoin Holdings With Significant Purchase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that a cryptocurrency whale recently acquired 200 Bitcoin at an average price of $82,750, amounting to a total value of $16.55 million. This transaction occurred two hours prior to the report. Following this purchase, the whale's total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 315 BTC, with a current value of $26.06 million.

data.title: MyShell Clarifies Rumors About Web3Port Association
data.description: According to Odaily, MyShell has addressed circulating rumors on the X platform, stating that there is no connection or involvement between the MyShell team and Web3Port. The company emphasized its commitment to innovation and the expansion of possibilities in AI and cryptocurrency.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has exploded more than 60 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 60.7598 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 57.9041 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 2.8557 million US dollars.

data.title: Tesla's stock price fell by more than 8% after it was halved from its historical high.
data.description: U.S. stock market trends show that Tesla’s stock price continued to fall after being halved from its historical high, once falling by more than 8% to $242.24.

data.title: A whale increased his holdings of 200 BTC 2 hours ago, worth $16.55 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale increased its holdings by 200 BTC 2 hours ago, worth 16.55 million US dollars. The whale currently holds 315 BTC, worth 26.06 million US dollars.

data.title: BTC falls below 81,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 81,000 USDT and is now at 80,985.9 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 3.11%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Many users reported that social platform X experienced service interruption
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that many users reported that X had service interruptions. According to the network status monitoring website DownDetector, 5,343 users in the UK reported that social platform X had service interruptions, and 11,166 users in the United States reported that social platform X had malfunctions.

data.title: Service Disruption Reported On Social Platform X In The UK And US
data.description: According to Odaily, numerous users have reported service interruptions on the social platform X. Monitoring site DownDetector indicates that 5,343 users in the United Kingdom have experienced disruptions, while 11,166 users in the United States have reported issues with the platform.
